summary: Zero-copy data path results after Track G (G1-G8)

zerocopy.note: Payload buffer alloc eliminated. Remaining allocs are from serde_json::Value tree deserialization (to be addressed in Track K with simd-json).
Send path now 0 allocs. Recv path allocs are JSON deserialization.

notes: Track G complete. Send path achieves 0 allocations per message after buffer pool warmup. Receive path eliminates payload buffer allocation but JSON Value tree deserialization still allocates (7 allocs). Track K (Serialization) will address this with simd-json.
